content.content: Create a new github repository named new_project, and invite all collaborators in emmajohnson/image_transformation as the collaborators.

First, I will create a new GitHub repository named "new_project". After successfully creating the repository, I will retrieve the information about the repository "emmajohnson/image_transformation" to get the list of collaborators. Then, I will invite those collaborators to the newly created repository.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_create_repo(repo_name="new_project")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
